title: Jewish settlers escalate West Bank terrorist attacks under the guise of war with Iran
subhed: Within just one week, Jewish extremists have killed five Palestinians and wounded 15. While these acts are sometimes condemned by the army or the government, in practice, Israeli authorities turn a blind eye.

title: France calls for new funding for civil nuclear energy
subhed: At the second world Nuclear Energy Summit, held in Paris on Tuesday, EU Commission head Ursula von der Leyen also announced a strategy to support small modular reactor investments, backed by a €200 million guarantee.

title: UN inquiry says Russia committed 'crimes against humanity' in deporting Ukrainian children
subhed: The UN's Independent International Commission of Inquiry on Ukraine said Russia had deported or transferred 'thousands' of children from occupied areas of Ukraine.

title: PSG is struggling but not yet out of the race
subhed: As Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) faces Chelsea on Wednesday in the round of 16 of the Champions League, the Parisian club has lost the dominance it displayed last season. Nevertheless, the current campaign is far from over, writes journalist Jérôme Latta.

title: The ghosts of the new Chilean president's family
subhed: José Antonio Kast, who will be sworn in on Wednesday, makes no secret of his admiration for Augusto Pinochet's regime. He is less forthcoming about his father's past as a former Wehrmacht soldier and his family's role during the atrocities committed in Paine during the 1973 coup.

One week before France's local elections, electorate leans right, poll shows
subhed: With environmental issues taking a back seat, security issues coming to the fore and a clear increase in support for the far-right Rassemblement National, the survey conducted by Ipsos BVA for Le Monde, Cevipof and the Jean Jaurès Foundation paints an unprecedented picture of the French political landscape.

title: Thomas Piketty: 'In the face of Trump's militaristic drift and looming disaster, Europe must equip itself to have global influence'
subhed: Following the intervention in Venezuela, the war against Iran launched by the US president signals yet another admission of weakness by the United States, observes the economist in his column. This military agitation primarily serves to bolster the US economy.

title: The United Arab Emirates is caught in the fog of war
subhed: Surprised by the scale of Iran's attacks on their territory, Emirati leaders have worked to downplay the impact in order to retain the confidence of investors and tourists, while continuing to place orders for weapons.
